chapter_title.en: Excellence of prime time over the last moments

text: وَ فِی حَدِیثٍ آخَرَ قَالَ الصَّادِقُ ع فَضْلُ الْوَقْتِ الْأَوَّلِ عَلَی الْأَخِیرِ کَفَضْلِ الْآخِرَهِ عَلَی الدُّنْیَا.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 2.  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq (a.s.) says, “The  excellence of prime time  over  the  last  moments  is  like  the  excellence  of Hereafter over this world.”
